No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building. Now, three desperate parties want the money - a blue collared ex-fighter (Adkins) who finds it while working as part of the demolition crew, a prison guard (Lundgren) willing to do anything to pay for his daughter's cancer treatment and a ruthless gang who claim to be the rightful owners. The demolition charges are set, everyone clears out and the Castle is set to fall in 90 minutes. The clock is ticking. Who will find the cash and: will they get out alive?

programme.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.

programme.title: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
programme.desc: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep108: Hammerhead Sharks + Blue Hole Adventure in Belize
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV explores the odd behavior of Hammerhead Sharks; goes on a Blue Hole adventure in Belize featuring a friendly shark; and takes a Deeper Dive to study Scalloped Hammerhead Sharks and Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 5 The Hopefuls
programme.desc: When a group of idealistic pioneers arrives in Virginia City, their naive belief that they can create a peaceful utopia in the harsh territory makes them targets for local con artists. The Cartwrights intervene to protect the newcomers, teaching them the difficult reality of frontier life while helping them secure their future

programme.title: Apache Rose

programme.title: 3 Bullets for Ringo

programme.title: Son of the Renegade 1953
programme.desc: In Son of the Renegade, cowboy star Johnny Carpenter saddles up for a tale of legacy and justice. As the son of a notorious outlaw, he fights to escape the shadow of his father’s crimes and prove himself a man of honor. With outlaws closing in and the law on his trail, he takes a stand to defend the innocent and clear his name. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes drama, and frontier grit, this Western asks—can the son of a renegade carve out a destiny of his own?
